title: Using monday.com for Task Management? Speak to one of our marketing managers!

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,

We’re looking for users who are using monday.com for task management and would be happy to have a short call with one of our marketing managers to share their workflow and boards!!

Anyone interested? Just reply here and we’ll set it up!

Thanks in advance

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Julia, how are you?

We are heavy users when it comes down to task management within Monday.com and always happy to have a quick talk about it. Let me know if you would like to setup a call.

Best!
Eltjo

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Perfect Eltjo
I’ll pass your email alone to Iris who is conducting the calls and she’ll set a time with you!

posts.author: jaykjapra (Jay Japra)
posts.cookedHtml: Happy to discuss some of our task management oriented workflow(s)!

posts.author: robin (robin)
posts.cookedHtml: Happy to schedule a call as well. Just PM me!

posts.author: redclaytroy (Troy Riemer)
posts.cookedHtml: We have all types of different task boards in our Monday.com account. Would be happy to have a short call with someone. We are a branding and design agency with all remote employees.

posts.author: Iris (Iris Yardeny)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jay,
Thanks a lot, I will contact you via email

posts.author: Iris (Iris Yardeny)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Robin,
Thanks a lot, I will contact you via email

posts.author: Iris (Iris Yardeny)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks Troy,
I will contact you via email

posts.author: marykate.meedzan (MaryKate Meedzan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Julia! We just started using Monday for task management and we’d love to set up a call.

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @marykate.meedzan

I’m just checking since you’re new to the platform that you have already established your workflow. The call is to understand your setup and what columns/features you use rather than a consultancy call on how to improve?

Thanks
Julia

posts.author: Altuijri (Ahmad)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to explorer better way for task management. The current way I am using is not efficient.

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Altuijri

I suggest adding a new topic in the “monday.com for” category. It’ll be easier for people to advise you if you provide some extra details on your current setup/what you’re trying to achieve/what’s not working for you!!

posts.author: sharvey (Simon Harvey)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Julia-monday.com We’re using Monday almost exclusively for task management. Happy to chat and share thoughts.
Simon

posts.author: Wilma (Wilma Charon)
posts.cookedHtml: Is this still available. I’m new to Monday.com and using for task management in a marketing agency and would love to learn more.

posts.author: andrewalmand (Andrew Almand)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Wilma Welcome to the Monday Community!

There might be some use case videos or webinars you can check out, I’ll let @Julia-monday.com answer that.

But if you have any specific questions, I would suggest making a new topic:
-The Use Cases section is a great resource if you are trying to determine how Monday can fit into your workflow, or if you have an idea already but need help with a specific setup feel free to post a question.
-The Hire a Specialist section is another option. If you want to explore hiring a trusted Monday partner to help you build the perfect workflow.

posts.author: Wilma (Wilma Charon)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Andrew. I’v already created a new case

posts.author: sharone (Sharon Esempio)
posts.cookedHtml: We are using monday.com to both post job positions and track where they are in the process with automated emails. This was the first one that we tried and it worked out very well after working through the process and modifying as we went, I used it for the basis for my volunteer recruitment. We posted our application as an embedded form on our website and then had it fill the new Volunteers board. I’m still working on the issue trying to get the schedule check boxes to populate the board correctly. I have had to do that part by hand as I haven’t figured it out yet.
